rules.title: Block Syntax
rules.description: A work package MUST conform to the wp.work_package multiline block structure.

rules.title: Stable Identifier
rules.description: A work package MUST define a stable identifier using only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

rules.title: Allowed Work Type
rules.description: The workType MUST be one of the allowed technology-agnostic work package types.

rules.title: Title Presence and Length
rules.description: A work package MUST have a non-empty title and SHOULD remain concise enough for deterministic review.

rules.title: Allowed Status
rules.description: The status MUST be one of the allowed lifecycle states.

rules.title: Allowed Priority
rules.description: The priority MUST be one of the allowed priority classes.

rules.title: Allowed Relation Type
rules.description: Each relation type MUST be part of the canonical relation vocabulary.

rules.title: ISO Due Date
rules.description: If a due date is present, it MUST be expressed in ISO 8601 calendar date format (YYYY-MM-DD).

rules.title: Estimate Format
rules.description: If an estimate is present, it MUST use a compact, deterministic duration token such as 30m, 4h, 2d, or 1w.
